1.limitations: None in the approved utility-calculator scope.
1.shortTermImpact: All 12 approved calculator journeys are available with aligned bilingual naming sounds and visible input validation.
1.longTermImpact: The exact 108-pair fixture prevents future English/Hindi alias drift while preserving the documented family-language spelling caveat.
1.bugBashStatus: Completed 2026-07-24 — fresh independent 60-focused-minute all-12 pass found no P0/P1; F7 was then fixed, regression-tested and production-verified.
1.lastVerified: 2026-07-24 · Production bundle index-C1i23ZgZ.js; corrected rows plus live EN/HI result, metadata and layout
1.sourceConfidence: Drik Panchang's parallel English/Hindi 108-pada tables; all positional pairs regression-tested
1.recommendedAction: No corrective action required; retain the 108-pair parity gate for future naming-table changes.

5.deliveryState: Built and tested locally — not publicly delivered
5.limitations: Not deployed; keys are stored in an environment variable and require a restart to rotate; quotas are in memory per process and reset on restart; multiple instances would each grant a full quota; engines are bundled at startup (~1 second); no datastore, key self-service, usage dashboard, SDK or developer portal.
5.shortTermImpact: External developers cannot use the API yet. Local and single-instance testing works, but key rotation is manual and there is no production URL or production monitoring.
5.longTermImpact: Public scale would make quota enforcement unreliable across instances and restarts, increase manual key-management work and weaken abuse/capacity visibility until shared storage, deployment and monitoring are added.
5.bugBashStatus: Required for this high-impact public platform — not completed. An uncommitted adversarial test exists, but there is no independent completed bug-bash record or production test evidence yet.
5.lastVerified: 2026-07-22 · Local HTTP smoke only; not production-verified
5.sourceConfidence: Not applicable — technical API; calculation engines retain their own source/anchor evidence
5.recommendedAction: Deploy the API behind production authentication; replace per-process quota state with shared durable storage; add key lifecycle/self-service and usage monitoring; then run contract, abuse, quota and production smoke tests.

12.deliveryState: Core overlay delivered; UI placement decision open
12.limitations: Empty holiday cards are removed and live-verified. The off/national/gazetted control still needs an owner-approved discoverable location outside the Daily answer area; its final phone/desktop and EN/HI bug bash remains.
12.shortTermImpact: Daily dates without a selected holiday no longer show a distracting empty card. Until placement is decided, users may not discover the overlay control from an empty Daily date.
12.longTermImpact: A poor control location could either clutter the primary Panchang answer or make optional government overlays hard to discover.
12.bugBashStatus: Required before re-closing this high-impact calendar journey — pending after owner-approved placement is implemented.
12.lastVerified: 2026-07-23 · Production: ordinary date hides empty card; Republic Day still renders
12.sourceConfidence: Primary government holiday source; non-religious overlay
12.recommendedAction: Approve the permanent holiday-overlay control location, implement it outside the Daily answer area, then complete EN/HI phone/desktop discovery, URL-restoration and calendar-marker bug-bash verification.
